title: Future of TV Briefing: How Netflix is shaking up the upfront deal model
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing looks at Netflix’s single- and multi-year deals with advertisers that extend beyond the scope of traditional upfront commitments.
summary_ko: 넷플릭스가 전통적인 업프론트 광고 계약 모델을 혁신하고 있습니다. 단년도 및 다년도 광고주와의 계약을 통해 기존 업프론트 약속 범위를 확장하고 있습니다. 이는 스트리밍 플랫폼의 광고 사업 모델 변화를 시사합니다.
summary_en: Netflix is revolutionizing the traditional upfront advertising deal model with innovative approaches. The streaming giant is extending beyond conventional upfront commitments through single and multi-year advertiser deals. This represents a significant shift in how streaming platforms approach their advertising business models.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 스트리밍 플랫폼의 새로운 광고 계약 모델을 활용해 더 유연하고 장기적인 마케팅 전략을 수립할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage streaming platforms' evolving ad deal models for more flexible and strategic long-term marketing approaches.
key_points: Netflix introducing flexible single and multi-year advertising deals
Moving beyond traditional upfront commitment models
Streaming platforms reshaping advertising business approaches

title: Retailers turn to digital rebates as alcohol sales slump
description: Grocers and C-stores are turning to digital alcohol rebates to try to boost alcohol sales and digital engagement.
summary_ko: 알코올 음료 판매가 부진한 상황에서 소매업체들이 디지털 리베이트로 전환하고 있습니다. 식료품점과 편의점들이 알코올 판매 증진과 디지털 고객 참여도 향상을 위해 디지털 리베이트를 활용하고 있습니다. 이는 전통적인 할인 방식에서 디지털 기반 인센티브로의 변화를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Retailers are pivoting to digital rebates as alcohol sales experience a slump across the market. Grocery stores and convenience stores are implementing digital alcohol rebate programs to boost both sales and digital customer engagement. This shift represents a move from traditional discount methods to digital-first incentive strategies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 디지털 리베이트 시스템을 통해 고객 참여도를 높이고 반복 구매를 유도하는 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider implementing digital rebate systems to increase customer engagement and drive repeat purchases during challenging market conditions.
key_points: Alcohol sales declining across retail channels
Digital rebates replacing traditional discount methods
Focus on boosting both sales and digital engagement

title: Some creators don’t see immediate value in Instagram’s controversial ‘Shop the Look’ AI test
description: Instagram's controversial Shop the Look rollout didn't ask for creators' consent, nor did it tag products they've endorsed. What did they learn from it?
summary_ko: 인스타그램의 'Shop the Look' AI 테스트가 크리에이터들의 동의 없이 진행되어 논란이 되고 있습니다. 일부 크리에이터들은 이 기능에서 즉각적인 가치를 찾지 못하고 있으며, 자신들이 추천한 제품이 태그되지 않는 문제가 있습니다. 이는 AI 기반 쇼핑 기능 도입 시 크리에이터와의 소통 부족을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Instagram's 'Shop the Look' AI test has sparked controversy by launching without creator consent or proper product tagging. Some creators are not seeing immediate value in this AI-powered shopping feature that fails to tag products they've actually endorsed. This highlights communication gaps when implementing AI-driven commerce features on social platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 쇼핑 기능을 도입할 때 크리에이터와의 사전 협의와 명확한 가치 제안이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must ensure proper creator consultation and clear value propositions when implementing AI-powered shopping features to avoid backlash.
key_points: Instagram launched Shop the Look AI without creator consent
Product tagging issues affecting creator endorsements
Mixed creator reception of AI-powered shopping features

title: Advertisers aren’t happy about picking up Meta’s European tax tab
description: As things stand, Meta hasn’t provided any communication to ad execs about these additional fees, beyond the email shared with Digiday.
summary_ko: 유럽의 새로운 세금 정책으로 인해 광고주들이 메타의 추가 세금 부담을 떠안게 되어 불만을 표출하고 있습니다. 메타는 디지데이와 공유한 이메일 외에는 광고 담당자들에게 이러한 추가 수수료에 대한 별도의 공지를 제공하지 않았습니다. 이는 플랫폼의 투명성 부족과 소통 문제를 드러냅니다.
summary_en: Advertisers are expressing dissatisfaction about bearing Meta's European tax burden due to new regional tax policies. Meta has not provided proper communication to advertising executives about these additional fees beyond a single email shared with Digiday. This situation reveals transparency and communication issues between the platform and its advertising partners.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 주요 플랫폼의 세금 정책 변화를 모니터링하고 광고 예산에 미치는 영향을 사전에 파악해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to monitor major platforms' tax policy changes and proactively assess their impact on advertising budgets.
key_points: European tax policies affecting Meta advertising costs
Limited communication from Meta about additional fees
Advertiser frustration with cost transparency issues

title: Why one creator commerce platform is connecting brands and creators for ‘flat-fee’ campaigns
description: Quick Collabs is LTK's latest attempt to make creator marketing campaigns faster and more scalable. for brands and creators alike.
summary_ko: 크리에이터 커머스 플랫폼이 브랜드와 크리에이터를 '정액 수수료' 캠페인으로 연결하는 새로운 방식을 도입했습니다. LTK의 Quick Collabs는 브랜드와 크리에이터 모두에게 크리에이터 마케팅 캠페인을 더 빠르고 확장 가능하게 만들려는 시도입니다. 이는 크리에이터 마케팅의 효율성과 접근성을 개선하는 방향으로 발전하고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: A creator commerce platform is introducing a new approach connecting brands and creators through 'flat-fee' campaign models. LTK's Quick Collabs represents an attempt to make creator marketing campaigns faster and more scalable for both brands and creators. This development shows the evolution toward more efficient and accessible creator marketing solutions.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 정액 수수료 모델을 통해 크리에이터 마케팅 비용을 예측 가능하게 하고 캠페인 확장성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage flat-fee models to make creator marketing costs more predictable while improving campaign scalability.
key_points: Introduction of flat-fee creator marketing campaigns
Focus on speed and scalability for both parties
LTK's Quick Collabs platform innovation

title: [AINews] Claude Cowork Dispatch: Anthropic's Answer to OpenClaw
description: a quiet day.
summary_ko: Anthropic이 OpenAI에 대응하는 Claude Cowork 서비스를 출시했습니다. 해당 서비스의 구체적인 기능이나 특징에 대한 상세 정보는 제한적입니다. AI 협업 도구 시장에서 경쟁이 심화되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Anthropic has launched Claude Cowork as their response to OpenAI's offerings. Limited details are available about the specific features and capabilities of this service. This indicates intensifying competition in the AI collaboration tools market.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 다양한 AI 협업 도구 옵션을 평가하여 고객 서비스와 내부 운영 효율성을 향상시킬 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should evaluate various AI collaboration tool options to enhance customer service capabilities and internal operational efficiency.
key_points: Anthropic launches Claude Cowork service
Competition with OpenAI intensifies
Limited information available about features

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Wednesday, March 18
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 18.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 18일 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 AI나 커머스와는 직접적인 연관성이 없습니다. 일반적인 엔터테인먼트 정보 제공 목적의 콘텐츠입니다.
summary_en: This article provides answers for the New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for March 18. It is gaming-related content with no direct connection to AI or commerce. This represents typical entertainment information content.
so_what_ko: D2C 비즈니스와 직접적인 연관성이 없는 콘텐츠로, 특별한 시사점은 없습니다.
so_what_en: This content has no direct relevance to D2C business operations and offers no specific implications.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers provided
Entertainment/gaming content
No business or tech implications

title: Do You Need to Upgrade Your MacBook Air? M5, M4, M3, M2, M1 Models Compared
description: With the release of the new M5 MacBook Air, has the time come to replace your current model? Join me as I go through each of the past four generations to help you answer that question.
summary_ko: 새로운 M5 MacBook Air 출시와 함께 기존 M1-M4 모델들과의 비교 분석을 제공합니다. 사용자들이 업그레이드 필요성을 판단할 수 있도록 각 세대별 성능과 특징을 검토합니다. 하드웨어 업그레이드 결정을 위한 가이드 역할을 합니다.
summary_en: The article provides a comparison analysis of the new M5 MacBook Air against previous M1-M4 models. It helps users evaluate the necessity of upgrading by reviewing performance and features across generations. This serves as a hardware upgrade decision guide.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 최신 하드웨어 성능을 활용한 더 나은 고객 경험과 업무 효율성을 위해 장비 업그레이드 전략을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should review equipment upgrade strategies to leverage latest hardware performance for better customer experience and operational efficiency.
key_points: M5 MacBook Air release and comparison
Multi-generation performance analysis
Upgrade decision guidance provided

title: Google, Meta and Amazon Join Global Pact to Fight Rising Online Scams
description: The companies will share fraud intelligence and coordinate responses as AI makes scams faster, cheaper and harder to detect.
summary_ko: Google, Meta, Amazon이 온라인 사기 방지를 위한 글로벌 협정에 참여했습니다. 이들 기업은 사기 정보를 공유하고 대응을 조율할 예정입니다. AI 기술이 사기를 더 빠르고 저렴하며 탐지하기 어렵게 만들고 있어 대응이 필요한 상황입니다.
summary_en: Google, Meta, and Amazon have joined a global pact to combat online scams. These companies will share fraud intelligence and coordinate their responses. AI technology is making scams faster, cheaper, and harder to detect, necessitating coordinated action.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 기반 사기가 증가하는 환경에서 고객 보호와 브랜드 신뢰도 유지를 위해 강화된 보안 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must build enhanced security systems to protect customers and maintain brand trust in an environment of increasing AI-powered fraud.
key_points: Tech giants collaborate against online scams
Fraud intelligence sharing initiative
AI making scams more sophisticated

title: Fitbit's Personal Health Coach Will Soon Understand Your Medical Records
description: Google says Fitbit's AI Coach will offer improved sleep insights and use your medical records for more personalized advice.
summary_ko: Fitbit의 AI 개인 건강 코치가 곧 사용자의 의료 기록을 이해할 수 있게 됩니다. Google은 이 기능이 향상된 수면 인사이트를 제공하고 더 개인화된 조언을 할 것이라고 발표했습니다. 의료 데이터와 AI를 결합한 헬스케어 서비스의 진화를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Fitbit's AI Personal Health Coach will soon understand users' medical records. Google announced this feature will provide improved sleep insights and more personalized advice. This represents the evolution of healthcare services combining medical data with AI.
so_what_ko: D2C 헬스케어 기업들은 AI와 개인 의료 데이터를 활용한 고도로 개인화된 건강 솔루션 개발을 통해 경쟁력을 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C healthcare companies can gain competitive advantage by developing highly personalized health solutions using AI and personal medical data.
key_points: Fitbit AI coach to access medical records
Enhanced personalization in health advice
Integration of medical data with wearable tech

title: E.U. Law Tightens Marketplace Selling
description:
Verification and transparency are becoming routine for marketplace sellers in the E.U.
The post E.U. Law Tightens Marketplace Selling appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 유럽연합이 마켓플레이스 판매자에 대한 검증 및 투명성 요구사항을 강화하는 새로운 법률을 시행했습니다. 이로 인해 EU 내 마켓플레이스에서 판매하는 업체들은 더욱 엄격한 규정을 준수해야 합니다. 판매자 신원 확인과 거래 투명성이 필수 요건이 되었습니다.
summary_en: The European Union has implemented new legislation that tightens verification and transparency requirements for marketplace sellers. This means companies selling on EU marketplaces must now comply with stricter regulations. Seller verification and transaction transparency have become mandatory requirements.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 EU 진출 시 새로운 규정 준수를 위한 법적 검토와 시스템 구축이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands expanding to EU markets need legal compliance review and system setup to meet new marketplace regulations.
key_points: EU implements stricter marketplace seller verification laws
Transparency requirements become mandatory for sellers
Compliance necessary for marketplace operations in EU

title: Vuori debuts women’s denim collection
description: At launch, the offering includes a pair of jeans and a denim jacket. It comes shortly after rival Fabletics expanded into denim.
summary_ko: 운동복 브랜드 Vuori가 여성용 데님 컬렉션을 출시했습니다. 런칭 제품에는 청바지와 데님 재킷이 포함되어 있습니다. 경쟁사 Fabletics가 최근 데님으로 확장한 직후 이뤄진 출시입니다.
summary_en: Athletic apparel brand Vuori has launched a women's denim collection. The launch offering includes a pair of jeans and a denim jacket. This comes shortly after competitor Fabletics expanded into the denim category.
so_what_ko: 운동복 브랜드의 데님 진출은 D2C 브랜드의 카테고리 확장 전략과 시장 경쟁 심화를 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Athletic brands expanding into denim demonstrates D2C category extension strategies and intensifying market competition.
key_points: Vuori launches women's denim collection with jeans and jacket
Follows competitor Fabletics' recent denim expansion
Shows athletic wear brands diversifying product categories

title: Ernesta secures $20M to fuel store expansion
description: The DTC rug brand plans to use the fresh capital to expand its brick-and-mortar footprint and improve its technology platform.
summary_ko: D2C 러그 브랜드 Ernesta가 매장 확장을 위해 2천만 달러 투자를 유치했습니다. 이 자금은 오프라인 매장 확대와 기술 플랫폼 개선에 사용될 예정입니다. D2C 브랜드의 옴니채널 전략 강화를 보여주는 사례입니다.
summary_en: DTC rug brand Ernesta has secured $20 million in funding to fuel store expansion. The fresh capital will be used to expand brick-and-mortar footprint and improve technology platform. This demonstrates DTC brands strengthening omnichannel strategies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드의 오프라인 진출과 기술 투자는 옴니채널 통합을 통한 성장 전략의 중요성을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: DTC brands' offline expansion and tech investment highlights the importance of omnichannel integration for growth strategies.
key_points: Ernesta raises $20M for physical store expansion
Funding also targets technology platform improvements
Shows DTC brands investing in omnichannel presence

title: David’s Bridal launches wholesale business
description: A selection of 50 gowns from designer brands is part of the retailer’s initial offering, along with private-label and white-label services.
summary_ko: 웨딩드레스 전문업체 David's Bridal이 도매 사업을 새롭게 시작했습니다. 초기 제품으로 디자이너 브랜드의 드레스 50종을 제공하며, 자체 브랜드와 화이트 라벨 서비스도 포함됩니다. 소매업체의 B2B 사업 확장 사례입니다.
summary_en: Wedding dress retailer David's Bridal has launched a wholesale business. The initial offering includes 50 gowns from designer brands, along with private-label and white-label services. This represents a retailer's expansion into B2B business.
so_what_ko: 기존 소매업체의 도매 진출은 D2C 브랜드가 B2B 채널 다각화를 통해 매출원을 확대할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Traditional retailers entering wholesale shows D2C brands can diversify revenue streams through B2B channel expansion.
key_points: David's Bridal launches wholesale with 50 designer gowns
Includes private-label and white-label services
Shows retailer diversification into B2B channels

title: Saks Global snags final $300M in bankruptcy financing, nears home stretch
description: An ad hoc group of senior secured bondholders has approved the luxury retailer’s five-year plan, aiming for double-digit adjusted EBITDA margin and profitable growth.
summary_ko: 럭셔리 리테일러 Saks Global이 파산 절차에서 최종 3억 달러 자금조달을 확보했습니다. 선순위 담보채권자 그룹이 회사의 5년 사업계획을 승인했습니다. 이 계획은 두 자릿수 조정 EBITDA 마진과 수익성 있는 성장을 목표로 합니다.
summary_en: Luxury retailer Saks Global has secured final $300M in bankruptcy financing. An ad hoc group of senior secured bondholders approved the company's five-year business plan. The plan aims for double-digit adjusted EBITDA margin and profitable growth.
so_what_ko: 럭셔리 리테일러의 구조조정 사례는 D2C 브랜드의 재무 건전성과 지속가능한 성장 전략의 중요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Luxury retailer restructuring highlights the importance of financial health and sustainable growth strategies for D2C brands.
key_points: Saks Global secures final $300M bankruptcy financing
Five-year plan targets double-digit EBITDA margins
Shows luxury retail restructuring and recovery efforts

title: Target consolidates spring savings event into 3 days
description: Competitors expanded the length of seasonal sales over the past year, but the retailer’s March event marks a reduction from 2025’s Target Circle Week sale.
summary_ko: 타겟은 2026년 봄 할인 이벤트를 3일로 단축했습니다. 이는 2025년 타겟 서클 위크보다 축소된 것입니다. 다른 경쟁사들이 계절 할인 기간을 확대하는 추세와 반대 방향입니다.
summary_en: Target consolidated its spring savings event to just 3 days in March 2026. This marks a reduction from the 2025 Target Circle Week sale duration. The move goes against competitors who have been expanding their seasonal sales periods.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 할인 기간의 최적화를 통해 고객 행동을 집중시키고 수익성을 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can optimize promotional periods to concentrate customer actions and improve profitability rather than following extended sale trends.
key_points: Target reduced spring event from previous year's longer duration
Contrarian approach while competitors expand seasonal sales
Focus on concentrated 3-day promotional period

title: #203: Anthropic vs. Pentagon Round 3, NYT AI vs. Humans Writing Test, Atlassian’s AI-Era Layoffs & Grammarly's Expert Cloning Scandal
description:
Anthropic has filed two federal lawsuits to block the Pentagon's supply chain risk designation and the back-and-forth on X between the Pentagon CTO and AI policy experts is revealing what this fight is really about. Paul and Mike unpack the politics, the implications, and why a deal is inevitable.

Then: 86,000 people took the NYT's AI writing quiz and most preferred the machine. Paul shares his human-to-machine writing scale and asks the question that actually matters: not whether AI can write, but when should we let it? Plus Atlassian's 1,600 AI-driven layoffs, Amazon's AI-caused outages, McKinsey's chatbot getting hacked in two hours, and more.

Show Notes: Access the show notes and show links here

Click here to take this week's AI Pulse.

Timestamps:

00:00:00 — Intro

00:03:11 — AI Pulse Survey Results

00:07:48 — Anthropic vs. Pentagon Round 3

00:30:02 — New York Times Releases Controversial "AI Writing Quality" Quiz

00:46:18 — Atlassian Layoffs and Job Loss Dashboard

00:58:4
summary_ko: 앤트로픽이 국방부의 공급망 위험 지정에 대해 연방 소송을 제기했습니다. 뉴욕타임즈의 AI 글쓰기 테스트에서 86,000명 중 대부분이 기계 작성 글을 선호했습니다. 아틀라시안은 AI로 인한 1,600명 해고를 단행했습니다.
summary_en: Anthropic filed federal lawsuits against the Pentagon's supply chain risk designation. In the NYT's AI writing quiz, most of 86,000 participants preferred machine-generated content. Atlassian conducted AI-driven layoffs affecting 1,600 employees.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 글쓰기 도구 도입 시 품질과 효율성의 균형점을 찾고, AI 자동화로 인한 조직 변화를 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should find the balance between quality and efficiency when adopting AI writing tools and prepare for organizational changes from AI automation.
key_points: Legal battles over AI regulation and government oversight
Consumer preference for AI-generated content in blind tests
Corporate restructuring driven by AI automation capabilities

title: Shopify changes its integration approach with ChatGPT
description:
Ecommerce technology provider Shopify and OpenAI’s ChatGPT are preparing changes to their integration plans after an initial announcement in September 2025. In September, ChatGPT began rolling out a payment experience it called “Instant Checkout.” The launch started with Etsy sellers, using the Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP). That launch with Etsy followed news from January 2025 […]
The post Shopify changes its integration approach with ChatGPT appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 쇼피파이와 오픈AI의 ChatGPT가 통합 계획을 변경하고 있습니다. 2025년 9월 발표된 초기 계획에서 수정사항이 생겼습니다. ChatGPT는 '인스턴트 체크아웃' 결제 경험을 Etsy 판매자들과 시작했습니다.
summary_en: Shopify and OpenAI's ChatGPT are preparing changes to their integration plans. The modifications come after an initial announcement in September 2025. ChatGPT launched 'Instant Checkout' payment experience starting with Etsy sellers.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 결제 통합 기술의 발전을 주시하며, 고객 결제 경험 개선을 위한 새로운 솔루션 도입을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should monitor AI payment integration developments and prepare to adopt new solutions for enhanced customer checkout experiences.
key_points: Major e-commerce platform adjusting AI integration strategy
ChatGPT's payment functionality expanding beyond initial scope
Agentic Commerce Protocol implementation with marketplace partners

title: Why Visa views agentic commerce as its next big growth opportunity
description:
Visa views agentic commerce as a significant growth opportunity within the payments industry, according to one of its C-suite executives. The payments company’s chief product and strategy officer, Jack Forestell, spoke at the Wolfe Research FinTech Forum in New York in mid-March. In a conversation with Wolfe Research analyst Darrin Peller, Forestell shared expectations that […]
The post Why Visa views agentic commerce as its next big growth opportunity appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 비자는 에이전틱 커머스를 결제 산업의 차세대 성장 기회로 보고 있습니다. 최고 제품 전략 책임자 잭 포레스텔이 울프 리서치 핀테크 포럼에서 이를 발표했습니다. 결제 회사로서 새로운 상거래 형태에 대한 기대를 표명했습니다.
summary_en: Visa views agentic commerce as a significant growth opportunity in the payments industry. Chief Product and Strategy Officer Jack Forestell shared this perspective at the Wolfe Research FinTech Forum. The payments company expressed expectations for this new form of commerce.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 에이전틱 커머스 환경에서의 결제 솔루션 변화를 준비하고, AI 에이전트 기반 구매 경험을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare for payment solution changes in agentic commerce environments and consider AI agent-based purchasing experiences.
key_points: Major payment processor identifying AI-driven commerce as growth area
Executive-level commitment to agentic commerce development
Strategic focus on emerging automated transaction technologies

title: Ulta Beauty adds TikTok Shop to its online sales efforts
description:
Ulta Beauty previewed a major new initiative in its social video plans, announcing during its fourth-quarter earnings call on March 12 that it would launch on TikTok Shop. Kecia Steelman, the president, CEO and director at Ulta Beauty, told investors on the call that TikTok would “be another quiver for us to continue to engage […]
The post Ulta Beauty adds TikTok Shop to its online sales efforts appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 울타 뷰티가 4분기 실적 발표에서 틱톡 샵 런칭을 발표했습니다. CEO 케시아 스틸맨이 3월 12일 투자자들에게 이를 공개했습니다. 틱톡은 고객 참여를 지속하는 또 다른 도구가 될 것이라고 설명했습니다.
summary_en: Ulta Beauty announced its TikTok Shop launch during its fourth-quarter earnings call. CEO Kecia Steelman revealed this to investors on March 12. TikTok was described as another tool to continue engaging customers.
so_what_ko: D2C 뷰티 브랜드는 틱톡 샵과 같은 소셜 커머스 플랫폼을 통해 젊은 고객층과의 접점을 확대하고 매출 채널을 다양화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C beauty brands should expand customer touchpoints and diversify sales channels through social commerce platforms like TikTok Shop to reach younger demographics.
key_points: Major beauty retailer expanding into social video commerce
TikTok Shop as strategic customer engagement platform
Social commerce integration with traditional retail operations

title: Gartner: Two-thirds of B2B buyers prefer rep-free purchasing as AI reshapes sales
description:
Nearly seven in 10 B2B buyers prefer to complete purchases without interacting with a sales representative, underscoring a shift toward rep-free, self-directed, digital buying behavior, according to a survey released by Gartner. It conducted the survey of 646 buyers from August 2025 through September 2025. Gartner found that 67% of B2B buyers favor a rep-free […]
The post Gartner: Two-thirds of B2B buyers prefer rep-free purchasing as AI reshapes sales appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Gartner 조사에 따르면 B2B 구매자의 67%가 영업담당자와의 상호작용 없이 구매를 완료하고 싶어한다고 밝혔습니다. 2025년 8-9월 646명의 구매자를 대상으로 한 설문조사 결과입니다. AI가 판매 프로세스를 재편하면서 셀프 서비스 디지털 구매 행동으로의 전환이 가속화되고 있습니다.
summary_en: A Gartner survey reveals that 67% of B2B buyers prefer completing purchases without sales representative interaction. The survey of 646 buyers was conducted from August to September 2025. This shift toward rep-free, self-directed digital buying behavior is being accelerated as AI reshapes the sales process.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 셀프 서비스 구매 경험을 강화하고 AI 기반 추천 및 자동화된 고객 여정을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must strengthen self-service purchase experiences and build AI-powered recommendation systems with automated customer journeys.
key_points: 67% of B2B buyers prefer rep-free purchasing experiences
Survey conducted on 646 buyers in late 2025
AI is driving shift toward self-directed digital buying behavior
Traditional sales representative models are becoming less preferred

title: Amazon pushes one-hour delivery deeper into U.S., raising stakes for B2B sellers
description:
Amazon is expanding one-hour and three-hour delivery options across the United States. The move, while aimed at consumers, raises expectations for speed across B2B purchasing and fulfillment. The company said the fast delivery services are now available in hundreds of metropolitan areas, covering tens of thousands of frequently purchased items such as cleaning supplies, office […]
The post Amazon pushes one-hour delivery deeper into U.S., raising stakes for B2B sellers appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 아마존이 미국 전역에서 1시간 및 3시간 배송 서비스를 확대하고 있습니다. 수백 개 대도시 지역에서 청소용품, 사무용품 등 자주 구매되는 수만 개 품목에 대해 빠른 배송을 제공합니다. 소비자 대상이지만 B2B 구매 및 풀필먼트에서도 배송 속도에 대한 기대치를 높이고 있습니다.
summary_en: Amazon is expanding one-hour and three-hour delivery options across the United States. The service covers tens of thousands of frequently purchased items like cleaning supplies and office products in hundreds of metropolitan areas. While targeting consumers, this move raises speed expectations across B2B purchasing and fulfillment.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 아마존의 배송 속도 기준에 맞춰 자사의 풀필먼트 역량을 강화하고 고객 기대치 상승에 대응해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to enhance their fulfillment capabilities to match Amazon's delivery speed standards and respond to rising customer expectations.
key_points: Amazon expanding 1-hour and 3-hour delivery across hundreds of US metro areas
Covers tens of thousands of frequently purchased items
Raises expectations for speed in B2B purchasing and fulfillment
Targeted at consumer market but impacts business buyers

title: The Pentagon is planning for AI companies to train on classified data, defense official says
description: The Pentagon is discussing plans to set up secure environments for generative AI companies to train military-specific versions of their models on classified data, MIT Technology Review has learned.  AI models like Anthropic’s Claude are already used to answer questions in classified settings; applications include analyzing targets in Iran. But allowing models to train on…
summary_ko: MIT Technology Review에 따르면 펜타곤이 생성형 AI 기업들이 기밀 데이터로 군사 특화 모델을 훈련할 수 있는 보안 환경 구축을 계획하고 있습니다. Anthropic의 Claude 같은 AI 모델은 이미 이란 표적 분석 등 기밀 설정에서 사용되고 있습니다. 기밀 데이터로 모델을 훈련시키는 새로운 접근법을 논의하고 있습니다.
summary_en: According to MIT Technology Review, the Pentagon is planning secure environments for generative AI companies to train military-specific models on classified data. AI models like Anthropic's Claude are already used in classified settings including analyzing targets in Iran. The Pentagon is discussing new approaches to allow models to train on classified information.
so_what_ko: 기업은 보안이 강화된 AI 솔루션에 대한 수요 증가를 예상하고 데이터 보안과 AI 활용 간의 균형을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Companies should anticipate growing demand for security-enhanced AI solutions and consider balancing data security with AI utilization.
key_points: Pentagon planning secure environments for AI training on classified data
AI models like Claude already used in classified military applications
Focus on developing military-specific AI model versions
Applications include target analysis in sensitive operations

title: Beverage marketer sees cost savings with agentic media-buying test
description: Completed with PubMatic and Butler/Till, the campaign’s fully automated media buying and optimization process reduced buy-side costs by 5.5x.
summary_ko: 음료 마케터가 PubMatic과 Butler/Till과 함께 진행한 에이전틱 미디어 구매 테스트에서 비용 절감 효과를 확인했습니다. 완전 자동화된 미디어 구매 및 최적화 프로세스를 통해 구매측 비용을 5.5배 절감했습니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음 - 추가 세부사항.
summary_en: A beverage marketer achieved cost savings through an agentic media-buying test conducted with PubMatic and Butler/Till. The fully automated media buying and optimization process reduced buy-side costs by 5.5x. Additional details not confirmed in the source material.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 에이전틱 AI를 활용한 미디어 구매 자동화로 광고 비용을 크게 절감하고 최적화 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can significantly reduce advertising costs and improve optimization efficiency through agentic AI-powered automated media buying.
key_points: Agentic media-buying test showed significant cost savings
Fully automated media buying and optimization process implemented
Buy-side costs reduced by 5.5x compared to traditional methods
Collaboration between beverage marketer, PubMatic, and Butler/Till

title: Sprite reclaims NBA soft drink sponsorship in blow to PepsiCo’s Starry
description: Starry held the title effectively since its launch in 2023 while Sprite has stayed active in basketball culture, including through “Obey Your Thirst.”
summary_ko: 스프라이트가 NBA 소프트드링크 스폰서십을 되찾으면서 펩시코의 스타리에게 타격을 주었습니다. 스타리는 2023년 출시 이후 사실상 이 타이틀을 보유하고 있었습니다. 스프라이트는 'Obey Your Thirst' 캠페인을 통해 농구 문화에서 활발한 활동을 지속해왔습니다.
summary_en: Sprite has reclaimed the NBA soft drink sponsorship, dealing a blow to PepsiCo's Starry brand. Starry had effectively held this title since its launch in 2023. Sprite has maintained active involvement in basketball culture, including through its 'Obey Your Thirst' campaign.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 스포츠 스폰서십과 문화적 연결을 통한 장기적 브랜드 구축 전략의 중요성을 인식해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should recognize the importance of long-term brand building strategies through sports sponsorships and cultural connections.
key_points: Sprite reclaimed NBA soft drink sponsorship from Starry
Starry held the sponsorship since its 2023 launch
Sprite maintained basketball culture presence through 'Obey Your Thirst'
Represents competitive shift in beverage brand sports marketing

title: Lands’ End names first CMO in nearly a decade amid turnaround push
description: The appointment of Sarah Sylvester, who most recently led marketing for Victoria’s Secret, represents a renewed focus by the retailer on brand building.
summary_ko: 랜즈 엔드가 거의 10년 만에 첫 CMO로 빅토리아 시크릿에서 마케팅을 이끌었던 사라 실베스터를 임명했습니다. 이번 인사는 소매업체의 브랜드 구축에 대한 새로운 집중을 나타냅니다. 회사의 턴어라운드 추진 과정에서 이루어진 결정입니다.
summary_en: Lands' End appointed Sarah Sylvester, who previously led marketing for Victoria's Secret, as their first CMO in nearly a decade. The appointment represents a renewed focus by the retailer on brand building. This decision comes as part of the company's turnaround push.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 경험 있는 마케팅 리더십 영입을 통해 브랜드 포지셔닝과 고객 관계를 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can strengthen brand positioning and customer relationships by recruiting experienced marketing leadership with proven track records.
key_points: First CMO appointment in nearly a decade signals strategic priority shift
Sarah Sylvester brings Victoria's Secret marketing experience
Focus on brand building amid company turnaround efforts

title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse
description:
Yesterday Nvidia revealed its latest upscaling tech, called DLSS 5, which it described as "the company's most significant breakthrough in computer graphics since the debut of real-time ray tracing in 2018." Sounds good, until you actually see it. According to Nvidia, the tech "infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials," but all anyone seemed to notice was that it turned recognizable faces into something resembling AI slop. Resident Evil Requiem protagonist Grace got a makeover that would make her look at home in a Tilly Norwood video. The Hogwarts Legacy kids looked like they'd been wrung through an Instagram filter. Even Liverpoo …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 엔비디아가 2018년 실시간 레이 트레이싱 이후 가장 중요한 컴퓨터 그래픽 혁신이라고 설명한 DLSS 5를 공개했습니다. 이 기술은 픽셀에 사실적인 조명과 재질을 주입한다고 하지만, 실제로는 인식 가능한 얼굴들을 AI가 생성한 것 같은 모습으로 변형시킵니다. 레지던트 이블과 호그와트 레거시 캐릭터들이 부자연스럽게 변형되는 문제가 지적되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Nvidia unveiled DLSS 5, described as the company's most significant computer graphics breakthrough since real-time ray tracing in 2018. The technology claims to infuse pixels with photoreal lighting and materials, but actually transforms recognizable faces into AI-generated-looking appearances. Characters from Resident Evil and Hogwarts Legacy appeared unnaturally altered, drawing criticism.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 시각 기술을 도입할 때 고객 경험의 자연스러움과 브랜드 신뢰도를 신중히 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully consider naturalness of customer experience and brand credibility when implementing AI-powered visual technologies.
key_points: DLSS 5 represents major advancement in AI upscaling technology
Technology creates unnatural facial transformations despite quality claims
Consumer reception highlights importance of realistic AI implementation

title: Now everyone in the US is getting Google’s personalized Gemini AI
description:
Google announced on Tuesday that all users in the US will now have access to its Personal Intelligence feature, which lets you connect various Google apps to provide context for Gemini's responses and suggestions. Access was previously limited to Google AI Pro and AI Ultra subscribers. Now, free-tier users in the US can also use Personal Intelligence through AI Mode in Search, Gemini in Chrome, and the Gemini app. However, the feature is currently only available to users on personal Google accounts, not business, enterprise, or education users. 
Personal Intelligence uses data from connected apps, like YouTube, Google Photos, and Gmail, to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 구글이 미국 내 모든 사용자에게 개인화된 제미나이 AI의 Personal Intelligence 기능을 확대 제공한다고 발표했습니다. 이전에는 Google AI Pro 및 Ultra 구독자에게만 제한되었던 기능입니다. 이 기능은 YouTube, Google Photos, Gmail 등 연결된 앱의 데이터를 활용해 제미나이의 응답과 제안에 맥락을 제공합니다.
summary_en: Google announced that all US users will now have access to Gemini AI's Personal Intelligence feature, which was previously limited to AI Pro and Ultra subscribers. The feature uses data from connected apps like YouTube, Google Photos, and Gmail to provide context for Gemini's responses and suggestions. It's available through AI Mode in Search, Gemini in Chrome, and the Gemini app for personal accounts only.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 개인화된 AI 서비스의 대중화 트렌드를 활용해 고객 데이터 기반의 맞춤형 경험을 제공할 수 있는 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should explore opportunities to leverage the democratization of personalized AI services to provide customized experiences based on customer data.
key_points: Personal Intelligence feature expanded to all US users from premium-only access
Integrates data from multiple Google apps for contextual AI responses
Currently limited to personal accounts, not business or enterprise users

title: Microsoft appoints a new Copilot boss after AI leadership shake-up
description:
Microsoft is doing another executive shuffle today to reorganize how it engineers its Copilot assistant. Different teams have been working on the consumer and commercial sides of Copilot for years, but Microsoft is about to unify parts of them in an effort to create a more cohesive Copilot for businesses and consumers.
The changes will see Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman focus on creating Microsoft's own AI models, instead of working directly on the assistant-like features of Copilot for consumers. Suleyman first joined Microsoft nearly two years ago, after Microsoft hired a bunch of folks from Inflection AI. Months after Suleyman's hirin …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 마이크로소프트가 AI 리더십 개편 이후 새로운 Copilot 책임자를 임명했습니다. 소비자와 상업용 Copilot을 담당하던 별도 팀들을 통합하여 기업과 소비자 모두를 위한 보다 통합된 Copilot을 만들려고 합니다. Microsoft AI CEO 무스타파 술레이만은 소비자용 Copilot의 어시스턴트 기능보다는 마이크로소프트 자체 AI 모델 개발에 집중하게 됩니다.
summary_en: Microsoft appointed a new Copilot boss following an AI leadership shake-up to reorganize how it engineers its Copilot assistant. The company is unifying teams that previously worked separately on consumer and commercial sides of Copilot to create a more cohesive experience. Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman will focus on creating Microsoft's own AI models rather than working directly on consumer assistant features.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 B2B와 B2C AI 솔루션의 통합 접근 방식을 통해 일관된 브랜드 경험과 효율적인 운영을 달성할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies can achieve consistent brand experience and efficient operations through integrated approaches to B2B and B2C AI solutions.
key_points: Executive reorganization aims to unify consumer and commercial Copilot development
Mustafa Suleyman shifts focus to AI model development from assistant features
Strategic move toward creating more cohesive AI experience across segments

title: The future of code is exciting and terrifying
description:
Suddenly it seems like everyone's a coder. Or, at the very least, like they play one in the Claude Code app. But even for the seasoned pros, the act of software development is changing fast - many people are writing less code themselves and instead spending their time managing agents and projects. So what does all that change mean, both for the code and the people who make it?

Verge subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Vergecast wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here.
On this episode of The Vergecast, Paul Ford, a writer and entrepreneur and longtime tech thinker, expl …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Claude Code 앱의 등장으로 누구나 코더가 될 수 있는 것처럼 보이며, 소프트웨어 개발 방식이 빠르게 변화하고 있습니다. 많은 사람들이 직접 코드를 작성하기보다는 에이전트와 프로젝트를 관리하는 데 시간을 보내고 있습니다. 이러한 변화는 코드와 개발자 모두에게 흥미롭고 동시에 무서운 미래를 의미합니다.
summary_en: The Claude Code app makes it seem like everyone can be a coder, and software development practices are changing rapidly. Many people are spending less time writing code themselves and more time managing agents and projects. These changes represent an exciting yet terrifying future for both code and the people who create it.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 로우코드/노코드 도구의 발전을 활용해 개발 비용을 절감하고 비개발자도 디지털 솔루션을 구축할 수 있는 환경을 조성해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should leverage advances in low-code/no-code tools to reduce development costs and enable non-developers to build digital solutions.
key_points: AI coding tools are democratizing software development capabilities
Shift from writing code to managing AI agents and projects
Fundamental changes in how software development work is conducted
